claim: Agentic Context Engineering (ACE): iterative refinement loop with Generator (creates answers from playbook), Reflector (analyzes quality and insights), Curator (updates playbook with deltas). Agents evolve by updating their own playbook.
actionable: Implement a Generator-Reflector-Curator cycle: generator consults a JSON playbook to answer queries, reflector validates quality, curator updates playbook only when insights warrant it. Persist playbook as JSON or in session state.
source_title: Agentic Context Engineering: Build Self Improving AI Agents

claim: Context collapse: accuracy drops and knowledge decays over time if context becomes too large or too small. Balance is critical—too much context causes 'lost in the middle' problems; too little loses information.
actionable: Monitor playbook size. Don't update every interaction; only update when new insights justify it. Use ACE's curator to intelligently prune and consolidate context.
source_title: Agentic Context Engineering: Build Self Improving AI Agents

claim: Playbook structure: stores bullet-point entries with ID, section, content, and optional guardrails (explicit, content, harmful, neutral). Perform CRUD operations to evolve without re-prompting the agent every time.
actionable: Structure your agent's persistent knowledge as a JSON playbook with bullet points. Have the agent perform create/read/update/delete operations on it. Avoid re-specifying context in every prompt.
source_title: Agentic Context Engineering: Build Self Improving AI Agents

claim: Delta operations: curator stores incremental learning updates (mutations) to apply to playbook; agents don't rewrite the whole context, just patch the parts that changed, avoiding context bloat.
actionable: Instead of rewriting the entire playbook, have curator generate delta patches (add/remove/update bullets). Apply deltas in sequence. This keeps playbook size controlled.
source_title: Agentic Context Engineering: Build Self Improving AI Agents

claim: Every interaction makes the agent smarter if you implement ACE correctly: agent consults playbook, reflector analyzes what worked/didn't, curator adds insights to playbook. Iterative refinement is automatic.
actionable: Design your agent lifecycle to be self-improving: agent answers based on playbook → you give feedback → reflector extracts insights → curator updates playbook for next interaction.
source_title: Agentic Context Engineering: Build Self Improving AI Agents
